name: hf-concept
description: Write the mandatory BASE CONCEPT for a motion-graphics video — a 100-plus-word visual contract across 6 dimensions (subject, composition, style, color palette with hex, typography, mood). Reads the project context.md (brief + brand kit) and fixes the look every later phase themes to. Use at the CONCEPT phase (phase 1) of a motion-graphics project, before any script, storyboard, or HTML is authored, or when restarting a project's creative direction. Produces 01-concept.md, the anchor the rubric grades brand application against. No rendering, no code.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: artifacts/<project-name>/context.md — the project brief plus brand kit (accent hex, fonts, label) and defaults written by onboarding.

inputs.name: brief
inputs.description: An inline brief, topic, or one-line description in the request. Used to sharpen the Subject when context.md is thin. Default = whatever context.md already carries.

outputs.name: concept
outputs.description: The base concept — 100-plus words across the 6 dimensions (subject, composition, style, color palette with hex, typography, mood); the visual contract every later phase reads.
